name: doxify
description: Adds Doxygen-style function comments to C/C++ codebases via a multi-agent build-review pipeline.

interface.shortDescription: Add Doxygen comments to C/C++ files.
interface.longDescription: Add Doxygen-style function comments to C/C++ header and source files. Runs a builder agent plus spec and quality reviewer agents per file pair, then commits.
defaultPrompt: Use /doxify to add Doxygen comments to C/C++ header and source files.
